meta.description: Corrects batch effects in merged bulk expression matrices with sample-level batch metadata using sva::ComBat(), preserves biological group structure, applies limma normalization, and generates paired before-and-after QC plots (boxplot, PCA, hierarchical clustering).

scientific_integrity.detail: No fabrication of statistical values; ComBat and normalizeBetweenArrays outputs derive from sva and limma package computations on user data

practice_boundaries.detail: No medical diagnoses; skill corrects technical batch variation without clinical conclusions

methodological_ground.detail: ComBat with biological group as covariate (mod matrix) is the correct approach for preserving biological signal during batch correction; post-ComBat limma normalization is methodologically sound

code_usability.detail: Syntactically correct; sva::ComBat() called with proper mod matrix; limma::normalizeBetweenArrays() applied post-correction; OMP thread limit set at startup for reproducibility; no infinite loops; clean exit codes

functional_suitability.note: Covers all promised use cases: auto/yes/no log transform, custom metadata columns, extra sample handling, paired QC plots, and both core correction steps (ComBat + normalizeBetweenArrays)

reliability.note: Nine SKILL_* codes including SKILL_INVALID_DATA, SKILL_INVALID_TYPE, and SKILL_TIMEOUT; validate_design() enforces ComBat design requirements; align_inputs() handles extra samples gracefully; one minor gap: negative value error does not identify source genes/samples

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 291 lines within budget; references directory for algorithm details; OMP thread limit env vars set for cross-platform reproducibility; one minor gap: no guidance on dataset size limits before ComBat performance degrades

agent_usability.note: Agent Response Contract specifies 5 structured outputs; When to Read External Files table guides navigation; four examples cover common scenarios including custom columns and disabled transforms; feedback design excellent with GC snapshot logging

human_usability.note: Natural trigger language; When Not to Use clearly excludes scRNA-seq, raw FASTQ, DEG without batch labels, and single-batch datasets; prerequisites section clear; extra sample subset behavior explicitly documented

security.note: No hardcoded credentials; no eval/exec; OMP env vars set at top level are safe system-level settings; one minor gap: output_dir path not checked for traversal

maintainability.note: Clean 7-script modular structure; input_functions.R separated for testability; implementation checklist present; one gap: no unit tests in polished package

agent_specific.note: Precise trigger language for ComBat batch correction; SKILL.md under 500 lines; idempotent via set.seed; escape hatches present; nine structured error codes; minor gap: GC snapshot logged to agent stdout may add noise; composability docs missing

inputs.label: ComBat correction on 2-batch 2-group expression matrix
inputs.note: Full 4-step workflow documented; auto log-transform correct; 9 output files produced; Agent Response Contract complete

assertions.text: Output routes to CLI with required parameters
assertions.note: Usage section provides exact command

assertions.text: Auto log-transform detection logic documented and implemented
assertions.note: Methods section and should_log_transform() in functions.R cover auto mode

assertions.text: SKILL_* codes cover all failure modes including SKILL_INVALID_DATA and SKILL_TIMEOUT
assertions.note: Nine distinct error codes in Error Handling table

assertions.text: Paired before/after QC plots documented and produced
assertions.note: Output Files table lists all 6 paired QC plots

assertions.text: Agent Response Contract specifies 5 structured outputs including QC assessment
assertions.note: Contract section present with QC assessment step

inputs.label: Custom metadata columns with log_transform disabled
inputs.note: Custom column resolution correct; log_transform no bypasses log2; example in SKILL.md

assertions.text: Custom column names resolved via validate_metadata_columns()
assertions.note: input_functions.R validates all three specified columns

assertions.text: log_transform no correctly bypasses log2 transformation
assertions.note: should_log_transform() returns FALSE for no mode

assertions.text: Custom column name example documented in SKILL.md
assertions.note: Examples section provides command with custom column names

assertions.text: SKILL_MISSING_COLUMNS fires when custom column name not found
assertions.note: validate_metadata_columns() checks column presence

assertions.text: set.seed applied for reproducibility
assertions.note: Implementation Checklist confirms; --seed parameter exposed

inputs.label: Batch with only 1 sample (below ComBat minimum)
inputs.note: SKILL_INVALID_DATA correctly triggered; ComBat design requirement enforced; minimum requirements documented

assertions.text: SKILL_INVALID_DATA triggered for batch with only 1 sample
assertions.note: validate_design() enforces minimum 2 per batch

assertions.text: Rationale for minimum batch size documented
assertions.note: ComBat EB estimation requires at least 2 samples per batch

assertions.text: Minimum 2 per group also enforced
assertions.note: validate_design() also checks group_counts

assertions.text: Minimum sample requirements documented in Input Format section
assertions.note: Requirements list in Sample Metadata section

assertions.text: Error exits cleanly with status 1
assertions.note: tryCatch error handler calls quit(status=1)

inputs.label: Expression matrix with extra QC sample columns not in metadata
inputs.note: Extra columns ignored with warning; subset behavior documented; SKILL_SAMPLE_MISMATCH for reverse case

assertions.text: Extra expression columns trigger warning, not error
assertions.note: align_inputs() emits log_warn() for extra samples

assertions.text: Analysis continues with metadata-matched samples only
assertions.note: align_inputs() subsets to metadata$sample_id

assertions.text: Subset behavior documented in SKILL.md Input Format
assertions.note: Expression matrix Requirements explicitly states this

assertions.text: Corrected output matrix contains only matched samples
assertions.note: write_core_outputs() uses aligned data from align_inputs()

assertions.text: SKILL_SAMPLE_MISMATCH fires when metadata samples absent from matrix
assertions.note: align_inputs() checks setdiff(metadata, expr_cols)

inputs.label: Expression matrix with negative values and forced log-transform
inputs.note: SKILL_INVALID_DATA correctly triggered; source genes/samples not identified in error message

assertions.text: SKILL_INVALID_DATA triggered for negative values with log_transform yes
assertions.note: prepare_expression_matrix() checks for negatives before log2()

assertions.text: Error message clearly states negative values cannot be log-transformed
assertions.note: Message is specific and actionable

assertions.text: auto mode would not trigger this for log-scale data
assertions.note: should_log_transform() returns FALSE when max < 50 and q99 < 16

assertions.text: Error message identifies which genes or samples contain negative values
assertions.note: No gene/sample identification in error; agent must search data independently

assertions.text: No silent coercion of negative values
assertions.note: Hard stop prevents misleading log transformation results

key_strengths: Most complete error handling of the five skills: nine SKILL_* codes covering SKILL_INVALID_DATA, SKILL_INVALID_TYPE, SKILL_EMPTY_FILE, SKILL_RUNTIME_ERROR, and SKILL_TIMEOUT
OMP/BLAS thread limit env vars set at startup ensure cross-platform reproducibility for ComBat's numerical computations
Graceful handling of extra expression columns (warn and continue) matches real-world pipeline usage where QC samples may be present
Auto log-transform detection with documented thresholds (max > 50 or 99th quantile > 16) prevents silent misclassification
Comprehensive paired before/after QC plots (boxplot, PCA, hierarchical clustering) provide full batch correction assessment

recommendations.title: Add gene/sample identification to negative-value error message
recommendations.problem: When SKILL_INVALID_DATA fires for negative expression values, the error does not identify which genes or samples contain the negatives, requiring the agent to scan the entire matrix.
recommendations.root_cause: prepare_expression_matrix() in functions.R checks any(expr_mat < 0) but does not compute which rows/columns contain negatives.
recommendations.fix: Before stopping, compute which genes (rownames) and how many samples contain negative values, and include a sample in the error message: 'Negative values found in N genes (e.g., GeneA, GeneB). Consider using --log_transform no if data is already on log scale.'
